problem id: 3385a400
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7)

examples:
  10010011 -> 11001001
  11101101 -> 11110110
  11011001 -> 11101100
  10000101 -> 11000010
  01010011 -> 10101001
  11000011 -> 11100001
  11101111 -> 11110111
  01111001 -> 10111100
  01000011 -> 10100001
  00000111 -> 10000011

query: 10001111
predicted answer: 11000111
